title: Hybrid Birds
description: A mod that adds a variety of new birds to the world of Minecraft
body:
**Hybrid Birds** is a mod focusing on adding a variety of new birds to the world of Minecraft, with six new birds currently in the mod (plus babies!)

**Currently available birds, and their babies:**
- Rooster - Chick
- Turkey - Poult
- Duck - Duckling
- Goose - Gosling
- Swan - Cygnet
- Guinea Fowl - Keet
- Peacock - Peachick

Most birds have some functionality added to them as well!

**Rooster**:
- Applies a new buff, Roosters Calling, if a player wakes up from a bed within 32 blocks of them, giving slight regeneration and saturation lasting until noon
- Scare away ocelots
- Can be fed glowberries to turn them aggressive, making them fight any other aggressive roosters for 10 seconds.. do with that what you will

**Turkey**:
- Can be fed wheat to fatten it up to two times, fatter turkeys can drop more meat when killed
- Scare away ocelots

**Guinea Fowl**:
- Behave exactly like chickens, but produce up to 4 keets when bred, making them a more efficient source of food

**Duck/Goose**:
- Drop raw duck and raw goose respectively, which can be combined with a raw turkey to create a Turducken

Coming with these new creatures are a bunch of new food items, including cooked eggs, ducks, geese, turkeys, and turducken, which is a placeable food item that can be eaten up to 10 times!
